productDisplayName: Rockport Men TR Bal Black Casual Shoes
description: Slip into laidback comfort with these Sport Bal shoes. Coming from rockport, these shoes feature uppers crafted from leather in a sporty style. Engineered with adidas AdiPRENE technology, this shoe offers all-day cushioning comfort making it a great buy. Upper Leather upper with overlays for added strength and durability Padded tongue and collar to protect from excessive rubbing and prevent blistering Lace-ups for a snug Fit Contrast stitch detailing for added style and reinforcement Brand logo embedded behind the collar Midsole Highly shock-absorbent adiPRENE technology infused cushioning protects the heel on impact for all day cushioned comfort Polyurethane (PU) Midsole Offers durability for long-term wear & shock absorbent-cushioning to help reduce foot fatigue Outsole Rubber outsole delivers shock absorption thereby reducing foot fatigue Textured surface provides better grip on all surfaces Flex grooves provide flexibility in foot movement Shoe care Use a leather brush to dust off the dirt Use a leather shoe polish to make the shoes shine Do not store in direct sunlight
